title: Refactoring Monolithic FastAPI into Routers and Middleware
rules: Split a monolithic main.py into routers by domain: pages, entries, trials, queue, auth.
Move rate limiter to middleware/rate_limit.py as a separate module.
Keep main.py under 60 lines: only FastAPI app creation, middleware registration, and router includes.
Each router MUST be an APIRouter instance with prefix-appropriate endpoints.
Backup original main.py before refactoring: cp main.py main.py.backup-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M).
Archive old versions instead of keeping 20+ backup files in the working directory.
Use Python's py_compile to check syntax before restarting the server.
rationale: A 778-line main.py is unmaintainable. Modular routers enable independent testing and development.
examples: main.py: 778 lines -> 52 lines after refactoring into 5 routers and 1 middleware module.

anketa_context.session_summary: Night refactoring session of SKV Network. Reduced main.py from 778 to 52 lines, created router and middleware structure.
